subcodes.title: Merhumlar Üçin Dogalar
subcodes.first_line:
## Merhumlar Üçin Dogalar

(Soňky deminde ýatan ynsanlar hem aýrylandan soň jaýlanýança okalýan doga)

Oldur enaýaty we
subcodes.notes: Author: BH (Bahá'u'lláh). Deceased/deathbed prayer -- 'Holy and Sanctified art Thou, O my God... Thou seest this soul who hath advanced toward the gates of Thy mercy, who hath come to the threshold of Thy grace.' Not found in inventory.
